yogurt-and-red-fruit-semifreddo-teleculi.name: Yogurt And Red Fruit Semifreddo
yogurt-and-red-fruit-semifreddo-teleculi.original_name: Semifrio de iogurte e frutos vermelhos
instructions: Start by making the syrup: light a pot with the red fruits, sugar and a little lemon juice and let the fruits fall apart. Reserve.
Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water for a few minutes. Then pour them out and melt them in a sea bath or microwave without letting them boil. Reserve.

Beat the cream until it's firm. On the other hand, mix the yogurts with the condensed milk and then the whipped cream. Incorporate the melted gelatin, stirring until it's very dissolved. Split this cream into two parts and add 1/3 of the syrup to one of them.

In a removable ring form, place interspersed layers of white and pink creams and biscuits previously wet in coffee. Take it to the cold until you start arresting. Lay the remaining syrup on the surface of the semi-cold, do the effects you see in the photo with the help of a toothpick and take it back to the cold until it is very firm.

yogurt-cake-with-cocoa-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt Cake With Cocoa
instructions: Fill a form with butter and sprinkle it with flour. In a bowl, throw in the yogurts, the oil, the sugar and the eggs and beat it very well.
Then add the flour, previously mixed with the yeast, slowly and always beating very well. Throw half the previous dough in another bowl, add the cocoa powder and beat well.
Lay the two masses in shape, alternating them and without mixing them too much. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 45 minutes or until it is cooked.
Stick a toothpick to check the cooking, remove it from the oven, peel it off and let it cool. Serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

yogurt-candy-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt Candy
instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. Lay the yogurts in a bowl, add the sugar and stir.

Drain the gelatin leaves, melt them in a sea bath or microwave, without boiling, and add to the bowl, in yarn and always stirring. On the other hand, beat the cream in whipped cream firmly and wrap it in the previous mixture until you get a cream.
Descasque os kiwis, lave-os e corte-os em rodelas finas. Descasque a papaia, corte-a ao meio, retire-lhe as sementes e lamine-a.

In a deep bowl, have alternate layers of papaya and crushed cookie. Cover it with the yogurt cream. Have the kiwi slices on the cream surface. In the center, put some crushed biscuit and decorate with strawberries. Serve fresh.
